---
title: "Structure Analysis Raccoons (grouped by Region)"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
---


```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(fig.path = "plots/", dev = c("png", "svg"), dpi = 400, cache = TRUE)

# color palette (reused for all K)
colors <- c("#1F77B4FF", "#FF7F0EFF", "#2CA02CFF", "#D62728FF", "#9467BDFF")
```
```{r regions_1, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# STRUCTURE Harvester .indfile paths
k1.file <- "/scratch/Raccoon_andrea/gabe_trial/analysis/structure/harvester/K1.indfile"
k2.file <- "/scratch/Raccoon_andrea/gabe_trial/analysis/structure/harvester/K2.indfile"
k3.file <- "/scratch/Raccoon_andrea/gabe_trial/analysis/structure/harvester/K3.indfile"
k4.file <- "/scratch/Raccoon_andrea/gabe_trial/analysis/structure/harvester/K4.indfile"

# Read indfiles and keep ID + Q columns
k1 <- read.table(k1.file, sep = "", stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>% 
  select(V2, V6) %>% rename(ID = V2, K1 = V6)

k2 <- read.table(k2.file, sep = "", stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>% 
  select(V2, V6, V7) %>% rename(ID = V2, K1 = V6, K2 = V7)

k3 <- read.table(k3.file, sep = "", stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>% 
  select(V2, V6, V7, V8) %>% rename(ID = V2, K1 = V6, K2 = V7, K3 = V8)

k4 <- read.table(k4.file, sep = "", stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>% 
  select(V2, V6, V7, V8, V9) %>% rename(ID = V2, K1 = V6, K2 = V7, K3 = V8, K4 = V9)

# Labels with county ("Location")
labels.df <- read.csv("/scratch/Raccoon_andrea/gabe_trial/scripts/PopulationGenetics/labels.csv",
                      stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
```

```{r avgQRun, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
avg_by_id <- function(df){
  df %>%
    mutate(ID = as.integer(ID)) %>%
    group_by(ID) %>%
    summarise(across(starts_with("K"), ~mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)), .groups = "drop") %>%
    arrange(ID)
}

k1.mean <- avg_by_id(k1)
k2.mean <- avg_by_id(k2)
k3.mean <- avg_by_id(k3)
k4.mean <- avg_by_id(k4)
```

```{r klong, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
region_map <- tibble::tribble(
  ~Location,   ~Region,
  # Southwest (SW Coastal Plain / Mobile basin)
  "Baldwin","SW","Mobile","SW","Monroe","SW","Marengo","SW","Dallas","SW",
  # Southeast (SE Coastal Plain)
  "Houston","SE","Dale","SE","Coffee","SE","Geneva","SE","Pike","SE","Barbour","SE",
  # Black Belt / Central (BB)
  "Montgomery","BB","Elmore","BB","Autauga","BB","Lee","BB","Chilton","BB","Macon","BB",
  # Northeast (NE Appalachian Foothills)
  "Calhoun","NE","Etowah","NE","Cherokee","NE","DeKalb","NE","Blount","NE",
  "Marshall","NE","StClair","NE","Talladega","NE","Shelby","NE","Jefferson","NE",
  "Morgan","NE","Cullman","NE",
  # Northwest (NW Tennessee Valley / Highland Rim) — no Fayette/Tuscaloosa
  "Lauderdale","NW","Colbert","NW","Lawrence","NW","Madison","NW","Jackson","NW"
)

# Attach Region to labels; keep any unmapped counties as "Other"
labels.region <- labels.df %>%
  mutate(Location = trimws(Location)) %>%
  left_join(region_map, by = "Location") %>%
  mutate(Region = fct_relevel(replace_na(Region, "Other"),
                              c("SW","SE","BB","NE","NW","Other")))

stopifnot(nrow(labels.region) == nrow(k1.mean))  # simple alignment check
```

```{r plotbyregion, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
add_region_order <- function(df_mean, labels_with_region){
  # Combine means + labels by row order (assumes labels are in the same ID order)
  df_long <- bind_cols(df_mean, labels_with_region) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("K"), names_to = "K", values_to = "value") %>%
    mutate(
      K = factor(K, levels = sort(unique(K))),
      Region = fct_relevel(Region, c("SW","SE","BB","NE","NW","Other")),
      ID = as.integer(ID)
    ) %>%
    arrange(Region, Location, ID, K) %>%
    group_by(Region) %>%
    mutate(Order = dense_rank(paste(Location, ID))) %>%
    ungroup()
  df_long
}

k1.long.reg <- add_region_order(k1.mean, labels.region)
k2.long.reg <- add_region_order(k2.mean, labels.region)
k3.long.reg <- add_region_order(k3.mean, labels.region)
k4.long.reg <- add_region_order(k4.mean, labels.region)
```

```{r plothelper, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(grid)     # for unit()

plot_region_bars <- function(df_long, title_txt,
                             strip_size = 16, axis_title = 14, title_size = 20) {

  ggplot(df_long, aes(x = Order, y = value, fill = K)) +
    geom_col(width = 1, colour = NA) +                     # clean, full-width bars
    scale_fill_manual(values = colors, drop = FALSE) +
    scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0))) +  # no extra side padding
    facet_grid(
      rows = NULL, cols = vars(Region),
      scales = "free_x", space = "free_x",
      switch = "x"                                         # put strips at the bottom
    ) +
    labs(
      title = title_txt,
      x = "Individuals (ordered within Region)",
      y = "Ancestry (Q)"
    ) +
    theme_light(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      # text sizes
      plot.title   = element_text(size = title_size, hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = axis_title),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = axis_title),

      # facet strip tweaks
      strip.placement = "outside",
      strip.text.x    = element_text(size = strip_size, colour = "white"),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey50", colour = NA),

      # spacing and grids
      panel.spacing.x = unit(0.5, "lines"),
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),

      # cleaner axes
      axis.text.x = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),

      # legend off (turn on with legend.position = "bottom" if desired)
      legend.position = "none"
    )
}
```

```{r plots, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# K = 1
plot_region_bars(k1.long.reg, "STRUCTURE K = 1 — facetted by Region")

plot_region_bars(k2.long.reg, "STRUCTURE K = 2 — facetted by Region")

plot_region_bars(k3.long.reg, "STRUCTURE K = 3 — facetted by Region")

plot_region_bars(k4.long.reg, "STRUCTURE K = 4 — facetted by Region")
```
